name: Jewels Of The Alps - Italy's Great Lakes
original_name: Jewels Of The Alps - Italy's Great Lakes
overview: The lakes of Northern Italy are considered as places of longing. The series "Beyond the Alps" shows the five largest of them as natural habitats and at the same time introduces people who are closely connected to the lakes.  Narrated by Eva Mattes, the world of the lakes is portrayed in high-class pictures. Five camera teams were on the road for 150 days, helicopter shots show the special features of this landscape from a bird's eye view.

trailers.title: Lake Garda, Jewel of Italy's Far North
The Surprising Secrets of Lake Como
